app.emptyTitle: What would you like to talk about?
app.emptyDescription: Choose a topic or start a fresh chat.
app.composerKeyboardHint: Enter to send • Shift+Enter for newline

sidebar.logoutConfirmDescription: You will be signed out immediately and returned to the sign-in page.

emptyState.title: Welcome to Shahid Beheshti University AI Assistant
emptyState.description: Start a conversation with the advanced AI assistant. Ask a question, get help, or just have a friendly chat.
suggestedPrompts: Composition of the Supreme Council of the Cultural Revolution
How to launch a new academic program at the university
Transition from probationary to permanent appointment
Minimum and maximum credits per semester
Allowed duration of study in the PhD program

chat.connectionError: Could not reach the response server. Please try again.

thinkingLevel.label: Thinking level

standard.title: Standard
standard.subtitle: Fast, direct answers without extra reasoning.

low.title: Low thinking
low.subtitle: Quick answers with minimal internal reasoning.

high.title: High thinking
high.subtitle: Deeper analysis with more processing time.

thinkingLevel.futureHint: Thinking levels are coming soon and cannot be changed yet.

attachment.label: Attach file
attachment.notAvailableYet: File attachments are coming soon and cannot be uploaded yet.

app.searchDisabledHint: Search is coming soon and is not active in this chat yet.

feedback.title: Send feedback
feedback.description: Selecting a reason helps us improve responses. Add a short note if you want to share more context.

chips.length_issue: It was too short / too long

hero.title: Shahid Beheshti University AI Assistant
hero.description: Unified authentication gateway for secure access to the university’s smart educational and research services.
hero.tagline: Secure, role-aware access for students, professors, and university staff.

card.loginDescription: Enter your university email and password to sign in.
card.signupDescription: To create an account, first verify your university email.
card.switchToSignup: Don’t have an account? Sign up
card.switchToLogin: Already have an account? Sign in
card.resetDescription: Enter your university email, verify the code, and create a new password.

signup.autoLoginSuccess: Account created successfully and you are now signed in.
signup.profileFieldsFutureNote: These fields complete your profile and are sent during registration according to the backend requirements.
signup.verifyFirstStepRequired: Please verify your email and verification code again first.
signup.otpSentHint: Enter the verification code sent to your email.

studentId.numeric: Student ID must contain digits only.
studentId.min: Student ID must be at least 5 digits.
studentId.max: Student ID must be at most 12 digits.

signup.otpInvalid: Verification code must be exactly 6 digits.
signup.roleRequired: Select professor or staff for @sbu.ac.ir email.
signup.roleInvalidForDomain: Selected role is not valid for this email domain.

password.min: Password must be at least 8 characters.
password.uppercase: Password must include at least one uppercase letter.
password.lowercase: Password must include at least one lowercase letter.
password.number: Password must include at least one number.
password.symbol: Password must include at least one symbol.

profile.firstNameMin: First name must be at least 2 characters.
profile.lastNameMin: Last name must be at least 2 characters.
profile.majorMin: Major must be at least 2 characters.
profile.entryYearInvalid: Entry year must be a Persian year between 1300 and 1500.

reset.requestErrorFallback: Failed to send password reset code.

profile.title: Profile details
profile.description: Review your role-specific profile details. Only your first and last name can be updated on this page.
profile.loadError: Could not load your profile. Please try again.
profile.saveError: Could not save your profile. Please try again.
profile.bannerDescription: You are in the right place. Complete your profile once to continue using the AI assistant.
profile.stillIncomplete: Your profile is saved, but required details are still missing. Please review the highlighted fields.
profile.editableNotice: Only first and last name can be edited here.
profile.incompleteHelp: Most academic/employment fields are fixed from registration. If anything is missing or incorrect, contact support or your administrator.

settings.title: Settings
settings.demoPageDescription: This page is added as a demo.

notFound.title: Sorry, this route is wrong.
notFound.description: The page you are looking for may have been renamed, removed, or you may have typed the address incorrectly.
